name: 25 MG Hydrochlorothiazide Tablets IP
about: 25 MG Hydrochlorothiazide Tablets IP is a general medicine used to treat hypertension and edema. These tablets are manufactured in India and come in a physical form of tablets. The recommended dosage of this drug is 25mg, which should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. This medication works by increasing the amount of urine produced, which helps to reduce excess fluid in the body. It is advised to store these tablets in a cool and dry place to maintain their effectiveness.
